title: Severance
creator: Ben Stiller
note: Season 2 picks up right where it left off. The Lumon mystery deepens and the performances are as unsettling as ever.

title: The Bear
creator: Christopher Storer
note: Chaotic, intense, and deeply human. Every episode feels like a controlled explosion in a kitchen.

title: Dune: Part Two
creator: Denis Villeneuve
note: A stunning technical achievement. Villeneuve turns the unfilmable into something genuinely awe-inspiring.

title: Blue Eye Samurai
creator: Michael Green
note: Gorgeous animation and a brutally compelling revenge story. One of the best animated series in years.
